mapper.select: SELECT pq.*, q.question_content, q.question_type, q.options, q.correct_answer, s.subject_name FROM paper_question pq LEFT JOIN question q ON pq.question_id = q.question_id LEFT JOIN subject s ON q.subject_id = s.subject_id WHERE pq.paper_id = #{paperId} ORDER BY pq.question_order

SELECT pq.*, q.question_content, q.question_type, q.options, q.correct_answer, s.subject_name FROM paper_question pq LEFT JOIN question q ON pq.question_id = q.question_id LEFT JOIN subject s ON q.subject_id = s.subject_id WHERE pq.paper_id = #{paperId} AND pq.question_id = #{questionId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO paper_question (paper_id, question_id, question_order, score) VALUES (#{paperId}, #{questionId}, #{questionOrder}, #{score})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM paper_question WHERE paper_id = #{paperId}
